title: diasperus micrandrus
intro: Diasperus micrandrus, also known as the small-fruited diasperus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Diasperus micrandrus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Diasperus micrandrus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, where the leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal brew.
